Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-15-2009 Off Calendar

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-19-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Interrogatory Answers And Production Of Documents; Separate Statement
Off Calendar Jan-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Jin Kim's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted in part and denied in part.

Special interrogatories.
9
Granted in part. The request is modified to only require production for the light rail line that is the subject of the complaint.

10
Granted.

11
Granted in part. The request is modified to only require production of complaints relating to accidents involving pedestrians.

Request for production of documents.
1, 2, 10, 11
Denied based on the representation by the defendant that it is only withholding the reports of Aurora Summers, Evelyn Wells and Sandra Garcia.

3
Granted.

4, 5
Denied based on defendant's representation that it would produce further documents.

6
Granted in part. The request is modified to only require production of records relating to accidents involving pedestrians. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2008 Set For Trial On Jun-15-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On May-27-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 602

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-15-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
